title: Serianthes lifouensis
intro: Serianthes lifouensis, also known as Lifou serianthes, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Pacific Island medicine, particularly in New Caledonia, to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Serianthes lifouensis include its antidiabetic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal supplements.
